title: Unreal Reboot and Production Expectations

video.note: Students build a castle environment in Unreal Engine while recording daily screen/camera evidence for a making-of documentary.

learningTarget: I can restart my Unreal workflow, set up my Q3 castle project, and begin documenting the production process with camera or screen-recorded evidence.

bellRinger.prompt: What should a behind-the-scenes documentary show that a final screenshot cannot show?

vocabulary.definition: A dated record of what was built, what was captured, what changed, and what needs to happen next.
Video captured from the computer screen to show workflow, testing, or before/after changes.
Camera or screen-recorded evidence that shows how a project was made.
Supporting footage that helps explain a process, place, detail, or action.
The Q3 Unreal scene students build, refine, walk through, and document.

slides.title: Q3 Lesson 01 - Unreal Reboot and Production Expectations

assignment.title: Q3 Production Project Setup
evidenceRequired: Screenshot of the Q3 project setup.
Written production goal for the castle environment.
Daily documentary clip or screen recording showing the setup process.

exitTicket: What did you capture today that would help someone understand the beginning of your castle project?
